introSection: Hullámvasút is a wooden side friction roller coaster currently standing but not operating at Holnemvolt Park in Budapest, Hungary.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster closed at the end of the 2015 season, with the park being incorporated into the adjacent zoo. Hullámvasút was one of the only rides that remains standing due to its historical significance. It is not known if the coaster will ever reopen.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 7 trains with 3 cars per train. In each car, riders are arranged 2 across in 5 rows, except for the middle car which has 4, for a total of 28 riders per train.

fullText:
Hullámvasút is a wooden side friction roller coaster currently standing but not operating at Holnemvolt Park in Budapest, Hungary.

The coaster closed at the end of the 2015 season, with the park being incorporated into the adjacent zoo. Hullámvasút was one of the only rides that remains standing due to its historical significance. It is not known if the coaster will ever reopen.



7 trains with 3 cars per train. In each car, riders are arranged 2 across in 5 rows, except for the middle car which has 4, for a total of 28 riders per train.
